title: Wii Craft
description:
!!W.I.P!!
Changes textures to textures from Wii Sports and Wii Sports Resort.
body:
Changes textures to textures from Wii Sports and Wii Sports Resort. 

**Progress of changing:**
- Wii Sports: **95%?** 
  (I think only training and fitness mode textures are left, but they aren't interesting)
- Wii Sports Resort: **10%**

# **What in resource pack?**
1. **Custom Paintings!**
2. **128x textures directly from original games!**  
3. **Famous Main Menu song!** **_Require [Menu Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/menumusic) mod!!!_**

   Made for fun.
